modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Multiple bot submissions on USD website form causing concern.

full_description_text: A web form on the USD public website is experiencing repeated submissions. This issue occurs multiple times in a short period. The submissions are being sent to Salesforce daily. There are currently no captchas implemented on the web forms, raising questions about necessary actions.
short_description: Multiple bot submissions on USD website form causing concern.
description: A web form on the USD public website is experiencing repeated submissions. This issue occurs multiple times in a short period. The submissions are being sent to Salesforce daily. There are currently no captchas implemented on the web forms, raising questions about necessary actions.
